creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
1) Great job on providing poudriere log!
2) Not so great on ignore errors in it:
===>  Building package for vagrant-1.6.5_1
pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir
pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir
pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir
pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir
pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir
pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir


Please remove all the @dirrm* lines in the pkg-plist, and check with poudriere again.
